title: Procedural CSS Creature Builder
description: A bio-engineering laboratory sandbox that procedurally generates animated CSS creatures with adjustable body morphology, eye arrays, limb counts, and real-time DNA sequence serialization.
author: Girish Madarkar
features: Real-time CSS custom property pipeline — slider mutations instantly route to --body-scale, --creature-hue, --eye-scale, and --anim-speed
Procedural structural appendage constructor with variable-count DOM injection for eyes and limbs
Staggered animation delays on limbs for fluid multi-pedal walk cycles via per-element animationDelay
Hardware-accelerated @keyframes sequences: breath (scale + border-radius morph) and walkCycle (offset rotational transforms)
DNA string serializer compressing 6 live parameters into a portable text code (e.g., B100-H180-E2-S100-L4-A100) with one-click clipboard copy
Random mutation injector performing chaotic procedural sweep across all parameter axes
Hue-following accent color system syncs UI chrome with the creature's generated color vector
Frosted glassmorphic panels with grid-incubator viewport and live telemetry readout
